---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Config-Generator
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Command used:
```bash
config-gen <config-type> --options
```

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- Node version: [e.g. 20.0.0]
- OS: [e.g. macOS, Linux, Windows]
- config-generator version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
